subcodes.first_line: O thou kind and beloved daughter! The letter dated November 2nd was duly received. As its contents indicated faith, assurance... ...My spiritual and material Physician is His Holiness Bahá'u'lláh. His Graces and Bestowals are sufficient for me.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @consumption of meat; vegetarianism; diet, @review of publications, @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
